message.content:
[
  {
    "title": "ISSP 2011: Health and Health Care (Integrated File)",
    "host": "GESIS – Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences (Data Archive)",
    "collection_mode": "Written survey",
    "topics": [
      "Diet and nutrition",
      "General health and well-being",
      "Medication and treatment",
      "Specific diseases, disorders and medical conditions"
    ],
    "description": "Cross-national survey module focusing on self-rated health, health behaviors, chronic conditions, health care utilization and satisfaction, and attitudes toward health systems and equality in access."
  },
  {
    "title": "GESIS Panel: Health and Health Behavior Modules (Germany)",
    "host": "GESIS – Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences (Data Archive)",
    "collection_mode": "Written survey",
    "topics": [
      "Diet and nutrition",
      "General health and well-being",
      "Medication and treatment",
      "Specific diseases, disorders and medical conditions"
    ],
    "description": "Probability-based panel of adults in Germany with repeated self-completion mail questionnaires covering self-rated health, chronic illnesses, medication use, dietary habits, physical activity, smoking, alcohol consumption, health care utilization, and well-being."
  }
]
